source_rationale: CD69 is a canonical early activation marker for T cells and other lymphocytes. FTL (ferritin light chain) is broadly expressed but can be upregulated in activated immune cells.
CD69 is a canonical early activation marker for T cells and other lymphocytes. FTL (ferritin light chain) is broadly expressed but can be upregulated in activated immune cells.

WIF1 (WNT inhibitory factor 1) is highly expressed in Müller glia of the retina, where it modulates WNT signaling in the retinal microenvironment.
